idea-plugin.name: Windows Themes
idea-plugin.description:
Classic Windows UI themes for IntelliJ IDEA.

Included themes:
  • Windows XP – the iconic default Windows XP visual style with blue title bars, the silver/gray panel chrome, and a light editor color scheme.
  • Windows Classic – the timeless Windows 95/NT/2000 look with silver 3D buttons, navy blue title bars, and classic text editor syntax highlighting.
